Table of Contents

NAME

SYNOPSIS

DESCRIPTION

The function returns the value of the process group ID of the foreground process group associated with the terminal device. If there is no foreground process group, returns an invalid process ID.

ERRORS

If an error occurs, returns -1 and the global variable is set to indicate the error, as follows: The argument is not a valid file descriptor. The calling process does not have a controlling terminal or the underlying terminal device represented by is not the controlling terminal.

SEE ALSO

STANDARDS

The function is expected to be compliant with the specification.
